form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 32-day let-up. Most recently won by 1.0 len at Veliefendi All Weather March 14 over 1400m defeating Operasyon carrying 57kg at $4.25. The run before that 4th of 12 at Veliefendi All Weather on February 21 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Gold Flower carrying 57kg at $4.45. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.
